item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
..i see nothing wrong here.. greetings online friends
Mr. Ping is my favorite. GOAT dad
trying to think of an example of this..
we could make it happen
i've already called the police
i want to be a part of that
dang
anyone know where/what?
finally
looks like it was an interesting dismount
as is tradition
that guy fucks
i have no issues with vga. regular usb is annoying to always guess wrong on the insert but it really has changed everything
mmm hmm
yes
reporters are always doing this
hat
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Dog makes executive decision
item.description: Emma has had enough.
item.dc:creator: Freespirit84

item.title: After 7 months of living in my truck, I finally found a home!
item.description: I moved into my truck in April following the destruction of my cabin (long story). I went tree planting and finished the season in July. I started looking for a place, but having 2 dogs makes makes it a tough go. I finally found a good place with some good roommates, and I move in November 1st. I love being mobile, but 7 months in the back of a truck with 2 active dogs gets to you after a bit. Here's a dog tax featuring the 2 critters in question. They're named Sköll and Hati, and they're my best buds.
item.dc:creator: weareheretodrinkyourbeer

item.title: Comic Mini-Dump
item.description:
A missed opportunity
EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes, imgurians (gotta admit that was fast)! Remember to hydrate and STAY SPOOKY! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: My beautiful boy Mango left us today
item.description: Today I lost one of the best friends a man could ever have. Mango was just about to turn 10 years old, but was taken from us by paralysis ticks. I rescued him as a feral kitten, and in return he was a fluffy guardian angel for me and my family for a decade. I can't describe how much pain we're in now, but it was an honour to share my life with this most noble of creatures.
item.dc:creator: LDRcycles

item.title: I'm old AF. I watched this newly released.

item.title: appropriated meme dump of 13 memes I recently found amusing
item.dc:creator: Cat2BKittenMe

item.title: Random Birthday Dump
item.description:
It's my birthday today, I work til 8 pm.
Currently at my sister's house working because I live in St Petersburg FL and my office building had the first 2 floors take heavy damage and flooding and it's closed.
My house took 6 feet of water and isn't livable atm
I saved my clothes, my computer and my art so I got that going for me.
Really glad it wasn't worse.
Looking forward to getting some sushi later after work and enjoying tomorrow off
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: All I said was that the Bosses are too busy kissing up to celebs and senators
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 66 (incredibly mysterious)
item.description:
Unhappily for us all! Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. The depression monster has been lurking this week, threatening to eat me (and not even in the fun way). Join me in viewing amusing images to distract from the frustration that is existence. Onwards!
Thanks, god
I'll be lurking about this Halloween, see if you can spot me
so cryptic, much allure. wow. very mystery.
super fucken weird
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
if not friend, why friend shaped?
I miss the days when every CD came with am album sleeve that included all the lyrics
but in the end, it doesn't even matter All righty, you've made it to the end of this dump! Until next time imgur friends, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy
